column2: Aggregated, public-source cruise + repatriation-flight dataset for academic modelling. No personal identifiers, seat numbers, flight numbers or private itineraries are included.
Compiled 2026-05-14. Situation is evolving; always re-check WHO/ECDC/official country updates before submission.
Ship–Flight SEIQRD / metapopulation-SEIR. Treat flights as directed aggregate mobility edges, not individual tracing.
Counts are source-dependent and classification can differ: WHO 12 May says 9 confirmed + 2 probable; ECDC 13 May says 8 confirmed + 2 probable + 1 inconclusive.
Use only aggregate country/facility-level data for public-health early warning, intervention assessment and risk evaluation.
The uploaded Yang et al. paper used migration In/Out terms in modified SEIR; this workbook adapts that logic to ship-to-flight outflows.
